title: Dogus University Library - Home Page -
content:
ANNOUNCEMENTS

ASME Digital Collection - ASME Journals database is available for access.

ASME Journals provide essential resources for engineers looking to keep abreast of the latest research, current theory, practice, and application.

EBSCO eBook Super Collection database is available for access.

It is an academic and multidisciplinary full-text e-book database and provides access to over 857,000 e-books across various subject areas.

MyLangPrep Language and Exam Preparation database is available for access.

The database is designed for online exams (YDS, YÖKDİL, TIPDİL, PTE, IELTS, TOEFL iBT) with questions and video solutions.

NEW PUBLICATIONS
